welcome.name_prompt: Ma non sappiamo ancora il tuo nome.

phone.headline: Qual è il tuo numero?
phone.verified_body: Il tuo numero è registrato. Una cosa in meno.
phone.consent_text: I agree to receive messages from Mingla via SMS or phone call, including verification codes, friend invitations, e experience reminders. Reply STOP to opt out or HELP for help. See our
phone.consent_accessibility: Agree to receive messages from Mingla

otp.headline: Inserisci il codice
otp.channel_label: Didn't get it? Try another way:
otp.error_max_attempts: Three tries, no luck. Try a different method below.
otp.error_wrong_code: That code didn't land. Try again.

details.headline: Quasi fatto.
details.body: Solo le basi. Ci pensiamo noi al resto.
details.country_helper: Sets your currency e units of measurement

value_prop.beat1_sub: Smetti di indovinare. Inizia ad andare.
value_prop.beat2_headline: Per appuntamenti, amici e uscite in solitaria.
value_prop.beat2_sub: Piani per ogni tipo di uscita.

intents.headline: Ora la parte divertente.
intents.body: Tocca ogni vibe che ti rappresenta.
intents.caption: Scegli quelli che ti entusiasmano.

location.settings_body:
Posizione is off for Mingla.
Turn it on in Settings so we can find
the best spots near you.
location.error_body:
Weak signal or GPS still warming up.
Try again or type your city instead.
location.idle_body:
Enable GPS so we can find hidden
gems right around the corner.

celebration.headline: Look at you go.
celebration.body: Four quick picks e you're done.

manual_location.headline: Drop your pin on the map
manual_location.body: Give us your exact address — down to the street — e we'll unlock the best spots around you.
manual_location.no_results: Hmm, we didn't catch that. Try a nearby street or neighborhood.
manual_location.helper: The more precise, the better your recommendations.
manual_location.privacy: Your exact location stays between us. Always.

categories.headline: What kind of places do you love?

budget.headline: Your sweet spot
budget.body: Pick the price ranges that work.
budget.caption: Gratuito stuff always shows up too.

transport.headline: How do you get around?
transport.body: Helps us nail the travel times.

travel_time.headline: How far will you go?
travel_time.caption: Up to {{minuti}} min by {{mode}}
travel_time.error: Couldn't save your preferences. Tap Riprova to try again.

friends.headline: Il tuo cerchio ristretto
friends.body: Aggiungi your closest people, then pair up. You'll discover things to do together, see what they love, e plan the good stuff side by side.
friends.empty_state: No friends here yet. Aggiungi someone you'd actually make plans with.
friends.pair_curated: See experiences curated for both of you.
friends.alert_self_message: You can't add yourself as a friend.
friends.alert_duplicate_message: This person is already in your list.
friends.alert_accept_error: Couldn't accept the pair request. Try again.
friends.alert_decline_error: Couldn't decline the pair request. Try again.
friends.alert_generic_error: Couldn't process the request. Try again.
friends.share_message: Ciao! Unisciti me on Mingla e let's find amazing experiences together. https://usemingla.com

collaborations.headline: Pianifica qualcosa insieme
collaborations.body: Inizio a session with your crew. Scopri things to do, vote on favorites, e actually make it happen.
collaborations.session_name_placeholder: e.g. Weekend plans, Data night ideas...
collaborations.generic_error: Hmm, that didn't work. Give it another go.
collaborations.empty_state: Aggiungi friends first — then you can start planning together.

consent.headline: One quick thing
consent.body: Mingla uses what you've shared — your tastes, your vibe, your location — to find experiences you'll genuinely love. Your data stays yours. We never sell it, e you can delete it anytime.
